content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE task PUBLIC "-//OASIS//DTD DITA Task//EN" "task.dtd">
<task id="task_kone_elevator">
  <title>Configuring KONE Elevator Settings</title>
  <shortdesc>Configure the KONE elevator settings to ensure optimal performance and safety in KONE DX Class elevator, KONE MonoSpace elevator, KONE MiniSpace elevator, and KONE TranSys elevator systems, as well as KONE escalator systems, using AEM Guides.</shortdesc>
</task>
author: author

content:
Configuring KONE Elevator Settings Configure the KONE elevator settings to ensure optimal performance and safety in KONE DX Class elevator, KONE MonoSpace elevator, KONE MiniSpace elevator, and KONE TranSys elevator systems, as well as KONE escalator systems, using AEM Guides. Access the KONE elevator settings menu in AEM Guides. Select the type of KONE elevator system (KONE DX Class elevator, KONE MonoSpace elevator, KONE MiniSpace elevator, or KONE TranSys elevator) or KONE escalator system you want to configure. Configure the settings according to the manufacturer's recommendations and your specific requirements, using AEM Guides for guidance and support. Save the changes and verify that the KONE elevator settings are working as expected. Test the KONE elevator system or KONE escalator system to ensure optimal performance and safety.

After completing these steps, you have successfully configured the KONE elevator settings for your KONE DX Class elevator, KONE MonoSpace elevator, KONE MiniSpace elevator, or KONE TranSys elevator system, or your KONE escalator system, using AEM Guides. The KONE elevator system or KONE escalator system is now optimized for performance and safety, and you have verified that the settings are working as expected.

author: author

content: Resolve Getting Error In Splunk In Case Of Native AEM Site Publishing Resolve errors in Splunk when publishing a native AEM site for KONE elevator documentation. When publishing a native AEM site for KONE elevator documentation, an error may occur in Splunk, related to a specific DITA map path (/content/dam/guides_regression/multimedia_report/MultimediaTestMap.ditamap) and preset name (NativeAEM2510). Verify the DITA map path and preset name in AEM Guides Check the error logs in the attached text file for specific error messages Update the DITA map path and preset name in AEM Guides to match the validated context The error in Splunk is resolved, and the native AEM site is published successfully for KONE elevator documentation. Verify that the native AEM site is published correctly and that there are no further errors in Splunk.

content: Resolve Getting Error In Splunk In Case Of Native AEM Guides Site Publishing for KONE Elevator 1.0 Documentation Resolve errors in Splunk when publishing a native AEM Guides site for KONE elevator 1.0 documentation. When publishing a native AEM Guides site for KONE elevator 1.0 documentation, an error may occur in Splunk, related to a specific DITA map path (/content/dam/guides_regression/multimedia_report/MultimediaTestMap.ditamap) and preset name (NativeAEM2510). To complete this task, you need access to AEM Guides and the KONE elevator 1.0 documentation, as well as the necessary permissions to update the DITA map path and preset name. content: Resolve Getting Error In Splunk In Case Of Native AEM Guides Site Publishing for KONE Elevator 1.0 Documentation Resolve errors in Splunk when publishing a native AEM Guides site for KONE elevator 1.0 documentation. When publishing a native AEM Guides site for KONE elevator 1.0 documentation, an error may occur in Splunk, related to a specific DITA map path (/content/dam/guides_regression/multimedia_report/MultimediaTestMap.ditamap) and preset name (NativeAEM2510). To complete this task, you need access to AEM Guides and the KONE elevator 1.0 documentation, as well as the necessary permissions to update the DITA map path and preset name. If you are using AEM 6.5, ensure you have the necessary patches and updates installed to avoid compatibility issues with KONE elevator documentation.
